nasb.text: Then Eleazar the priest said to the men of war who had gone to battle, “This is the statute of the law which the Lord has commanded Moses:

esv.text: Then Eleazar the priest said to the men in the army who had gone to battle: “This is the statute of the law that the Lord has commanded Moses:

cnv.text: 以利亞撒祭司對打仗回來的兵丁說：“這是耶和華吩咐摩西的律例：

ccb.text: 以利亚撒祭司对打仗回来的军兵说：“以下是耶和华借摩西颁布的律例。
